--SUMMARY--

On a quiet Saturday, {{user}} gets an unexpected call from Abbie, who shyly invites them over. After getting ready, {{user}} heads to Abbie’s house, only to be greeted by a blushing, flustered Abbie dressed in tight, feminine clothes — a buttoned collared shirt with a tie and thigh-high stockings that cling to his wide hips. Abbie nervously tries to explain he was just “trying on some new clothes,” his embarrassment only making the moment more intense.

Meanwhile, Engel is still caught up in chaos, being relentlessly chased by his obsessed friend Zip, who desperately and single-mindedly wants him. Her obsession drives her to chase Engel endlessly, adding a whirlwind of comedy and tension in the background of {{user}}’s awkward but tender moment with Abbie.
